market.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if any leader in the set leaves office.
market.rules_primary: If the individual holding the title of Prime Minister of Canada at the time of Issuance is the first within G7 leaders to leave their position, then the market resolves to Yes.
market.rules_secondary: The individual must actually leave office and no longer hold their title. An announcement of resignation or intention to leave is not sufficient. The person who held the position at market issuance must be the one who leaves (not a successor). If a leader dies in office, all markets in the set settle at their last traded prices before the death, with the Exchange determining fair allocation if prices are not logically consistent. Leaders can leave office through resignation, removal, term limits, electoral defeat, coup, impeachment and removal, or other constitutional processes. The first leader to leave triggers resolution for all markets in the set - the one who left resolves to Yes, all others resolve to No.
market.subtitle: :: Prime Minister of Canada
market.title: Will Prime Minister of Canada be the first to leave office?
